hero.headline: Implementation engineer who builds what he deploys
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS rollouts across the UK, US, and Middle East. 5 years bridging business requirements and technical execution — engineering configurations and integrations on-site and remote. Now building AI-native tools that solve the problems I've lived through.

experience.title: Implementation Engineer
bullets: Engineered 20 end-to-end enterprise CMMS/SaaS configurations for mid-to-large clients — full technical ownership from requirements analysis through post-go-live support.
Designed and tested SaaS configurations tailored to each client's operational workflow, ensuring smooth adoption and maintenance operations.
Collaborated with clients to gather technical requirements and translate them into working system configurations and integration specifications.
Worked cross-functionally with product, engineering, and design teams to implement client-specific customizations and drive technical improvements.

highlights.label: Technical framework
highlights.text: Engineered a use-case-driven implementation framework with complexity scoring and effort models — enabling technical teams to scope configurations accurately, auto-calculate development timelines, and reduce implementation ambiguity.

highlights.label: Configuration expertise
highlights.text: Identified scope-change technical requirements and built tracking mechanisms for configuration efforts. Collaborated with Sales to quantify Professional Services credits for technical customizations.

highlights.label: Global implementation
highlights.text: Travelled on-site to Saudi Arabia and UK for technical implementations — field requirement gathering, system configuration, and technical training across UK, US, and Middle East deployments.

highlights.label: Technical conversion success
highlights.text: 4 of 5 pilots converted to full-scale enterprise implementations through technical proof-of-concepts, configuration demonstrations, and deep system integration during pilot phases, driving $350K+ in technical expansion value.

highlights.label: Requirements Engineering
highlights.text: Owned technical requirements analysis — from configuration workshops with client stakeholders to documenting technical specifications with solution architectures. Worked with integration, product, and engineering teams to implement configurations that fit each client's operational workflow.

highlights.label: Integration Engineering
highlights.text: Scoped and engineered integration requirements across SSO (SAML/SCIM) and third-party platforms including Xero, CorrigoPro, Equiem, Wooqer, Bill.com, SiteFotos, and SFG20. Validated API feasibility via Postman and vendor documentation, determined integration patterns (polling vs webhook), and implemented integration configurations for client deployments.

summary: Implementation engineer with 5+ years delivering 20 enterprise SaaS/CMMS configurations across the UK, US, and Middle East — full technical lifecycle ownership from requirements analysis through post-go-live support. Expert at engineering complex business requirements into working SaaS configurations and measurable technical outcomes. Now building AI-native tools that solve the operational problems I've implemented solutions for firsthand.
